TemplateNotFoundz
Raised if a template does not exist.
    .. versionchanged:: 2.11
        If the given name is :class:`Undefined` and no message was
        provided, an :exc:`UndefinedError` is raised.
    Nr
namer
IOErrorr
runtimer
isinstanceZ
_fail_with_undefined_errorr
	templates)
TemplateNotFound.__init__r
__str__1
TemplateNotFound.__str__)
__annotations__
Unionr
TemplatesNotFounda
Like :class:`TemplateNotFound` but raised if multiple templates
    are selected.  This is a subclass of :class:`TemplateNotFound`
    exception, so just catching the base exception will catch both.
    .. versionchanged:: 2.11
        If a name in the list of names is :class:`Undefined`, a message
        about it being undefined is shown rather than the empty string.
    .. versionadded:: 2.2
    r
namesr
, z(none of the templates given were found: 
appendZ
_undefined_message

listr!

Z	parts_strr

Z	d	d
TemplateSyntaxErrorzBRaised to tell the user that there is a problem with the template.N)
linenor
filenamer
source
translated)
TemplateSyntaxError.__init__r
line z
File "z
", z
    
castr
splitlines
IndexErrorr(
stripr)
locationr
lines
liner
TemplateSyntaxError.__str__c
__reduce__
TemplateSyntaxError.__reduce__)
intr
TemplateAssertionErrora
Like a template syntax error, but covers cases where something in the
    template caused an error at compile time that wasn't necessarily caused
    by a syntax error.  However it's a direct subclass of
    :exc:`TemplateSyntaxError` and has the same attributes.
    N
TemplateRuntimeErrorzoA generic runtime error in the template engine.  Under some situations
    Jinja may raise this exception.
    Nr>
UndefinedErrorz<Raised if a template tries to operate on :class:`Undefined`.Nr>
SecurityErrorzWRaised if a template tries to do something insecure if the
    sandbox is enabled.
    Nr>
FilterArgumentErrorzQThis error is raised if a filter was called with inappropriate
    arguments
    Nr>
typingr
